title: Build Samay Pizza Food Delivery Website (3 Pages)

requirements.text: Rebuild the entire application as a 3-page food delivery website for 'Samay Pizza'. Replace all existing Funded Flex branding, routes, components, and pages with the new Samay Pizza website. The site must use a Deep Red (#C0392B / #B71C1C) and White color theme throughout, be fully mobile-responsive, and have a clean restaurant-style design.

quotes: Create a 3-page professional food delivery website (Home, Menu, Order) for 'Samay Pizza'
Colors: Deep Red and White theme

acceptanceCriteria: All Funded Flex branding and content is removed
Site has exactly 3 pages: Home, Menu, and Order/Checkout
Deep Red and White theme is applied consistently across all pages
Site is fully mobile-responsive on all screen sizes
Navigation links between Home, Menu, and Order pages work correctly

requirements.text: Create the Home page with: (1) a large hero section with 'Welcome to Samay Pizza' headline and subtext, (2) fast delivery feature icons/badges, (3) a prominent 'Order Now' button that navigates to the Menu page, and (4) a footer displaying the restaurant address (Sonauli Road Pipiganj, Gorakhpur, U.P.), contact WhatsApp number +918957401994, email monikakgupta2507@gmail.com, and website samaypizza.com.

quotes: Large hero section with a 'Welcome to Samay Pizza' message
Fast delivery icons and 'Order Now' button leading to the Menu page
Restaurant address is Sonauli road Pipiganj, Gorakhpur(U.P)

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays 'Welcome to Samay Pizza' prominently
Fast delivery icons/badges are visible in the hero or below it
'Order Now' button navigates to the Menu page
Footer shows address: Sonauli Road Pipiganj, Gorakhpur (U.P.)
Footer shows WhatsApp: +918957401994 and email: monikakgupta2507@gmail.com

requirements.text: Create the Menu page with categorized menu items and pricing displayed as cards or a structured list. Categories and items: (1) Pizza (Regular/Medium/Large pricing): Cheese Corn (₹90/150/250), Spicy Indian (₹100/150/250), Simply Veg, Paneer Ka Maza, Double Cheese, Paneer Makhani, Sabz Bahar, Samay Pizza Special (₹150/180/300), Tandoori Paneer, Veggie Supreme, Best Pataka, Chatpata Paneer. (2) Chinese (Half/Full): Veg Chowmein (₹50/100), Paneer Chowmein (₹60/120), Mix Chowmein, Paneer Chilli, Paneer Chilli Gravy, Chilli Potato, Veg Manchurian Dry/Gravy. (3) Rice (Half/Full): Veg Fried Rice (₹50/100), Paneer Fried Rice (₹60/120), Veg Biryani (₹70/130). (4) Burger: Veg Burger (₹40), Classic Burger (₹60), Veg Cheese Burger (₹60), Classic Cheese Burger (₹80). (5) Snacks/Extras: French Fries, Lava Cake, Extra Cheese/Toppings. Each menu item must have an 'Add to Cart' button that adds the selected size/variant to a cart state.

quotes: Create a digital menu with categories and specific pricing

acceptanceCriteria: All 5 categories are displayed with clear section headers
All pizza items show Regular/Medium/Large size options with correct prices
All Chinese and Rice items show Half/Full options with correct prices
All burger items show fixed price
Snacks/Extras section is displayed
'Add to Cart' button works and updates cart count/state
Size/variant selector appears before adding to cart where applicable

requirements.text: Create the Order/Checkout page with: (1) a cart summary showing all added items, quantities, sizes, and total price; (2) a customer form with fields for Name, Phone Number, and Delivery Address; (3) a 'Place Order' button that opens WhatsApp (wa.me/918957401994) with a pre-filled message containing the full item list, total price, and customer details; (4) a UPI payment section displaying UPI ID 'monikabhojwal2507@okhdfcbank' and a generated QR code image for this UPI ID, with a 'Pay Now' button.

quotes: A form for Name, Phone Number, and Address
Open WhatsApp with a pre-filled message containing the full order list, total price, and customer address
Display the UPI QR code for payment

acceptanceCriteria: Cart summary lists all added items with sizes and subtotals
Total price is calculated and displayed correctly
Customer form has Name, Phone Number, and Address fields with validation
'Place Order' opens WhatsApp link for +918957401994 with pre-filled order message
WhatsApp message includes item list, total, name, phone, and address
UPI ID 'monikabhojwal2507@okhdfcbank' is displayed
UPI QR code image is rendered on the page

requirements.text: Store contact form submissions and order details in the backend canister. The backend should accept and persist: customer name, phone number, address, order items (as a text summary), and total price. Provide a query method for the admin to retrieve all orders.

quotes: Send an automated email with the same details to the owner's email

acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor has a method to submit an order with customer details and order summary
Orders are persisted in stable storage
An admin query method returns all submitted orders
Order submission returns a success/failure result

requirements.text: Apply a visually rich Deep Red and White design theme across the entire site: deep red (#B71C1C or #C0392B) as the primary brand color for headers, buttons, and accents; white backgrounds for content areas; warm typography; food-appropriate iconography (pizza, delivery scooter, etc.); smooth hover effects on menu cards and buttons.

quotes: Colors: Deep Red and White theme

acceptanceCriteria: Primary brand color is deep red used consistently on CTAs, headers, and highlights
Content areas use white/off-white backgrounds for readability
Menu item cards have hover effects
Buttons have red background with white text
Overall design feels professional and food-brand appropriate

constraints: WhatsApp order link must use phone number +918957401994 (wa.me/918957401994)
UPI ID must be exactly: monikabhojwal2507@okhdfcbank
Restaurant address must read: Sonauli Road Pipiganj, Gorakhpur (U.P.)
Do not use Next.js — use React with React Router as per platform stack
Email sending via SMTP or external service is not supported; WhatsApp link is the primary order action
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
nonGoals: Automated email delivery to owner (not supported by platform)
Online payment gateway integration (only UPI QR code display)

required: Deep red and white hero banner with a hot pizza illustration and warm restaurant ambiance (hero-banner.dim_1200x500.png)
Samay Pizza logo with a stylized pizza slice and bold red text on white background (samay-pizza-logo.dim_300x300.png)
UPI QR code graphic for UPI ID monikabhojwal2507@okhdfcbank in a clean white card with red border (upi-qr-code.dim_300x300.png)
